blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Blocked by browser environment: WebGL2 initialization failure prevents the launched annotation tool from becoming interactive, so the direct-launch affordance is visible but the runnable user flow cannot complete.
Blocked by the same WebGL2 viewer initialization failure; the direct-launch UI is present, but the measurement session cannot be exercised through the user surface.
Blocked because the review workbench did not bind seeded lineage, and the WebGL2 failure prevented creating/confirming annotations for reload verification.
Blocked by the viewer environment; cannot verify temporary pre-confirm measurement behavior without an active measurement session.
Blocked by missing bound task context plus WebGL2 failure, so replay of seeded measurement records could not be demonstrated through the UI.
Blocked downstream of reviewer-side measurement validation; without a reviewer replay state, designer parity could not be tested meaningfully.
Blocked by environment and task-binding issues; the combined flow could not advance to confirmation.
Blocked because prerequisite reviewer-side record creation/replay could not be completed in the browser environment.
